mapper.select: SELECT staff_no AS staffNo, name AS name, password AS password, auth_no AS authNo, del AS del FROM staff_data WHERE del = 0
SELECT staff_no AS staffNo, name AS name, password AS password, auth_no AS authNo, del AS del FROM staff_data WHERE staff_no = #{staffNo}
SELECT auth_no AS authNo, auth_name AS authName, remarks AS remarks, del AS del FROM auth_master
SELECT auth_no AS authNo, auth_name AS authName, remarks AS remarks, del AS del FROM auth_master WHERE auth_no = #{authNo}
SELECT staff_no AS staffNo, name AS name, password AS password, auth_no AS authNo, del AS del FROM staff_data
